critique: Step 1 is incorrect. The function f_select_row is meant to filter rows based on the question. Here, the task is to determine the duration of Tamera Mowry’s television work, which requires identifying the earliest and latest years, not selecting all rows. Using f_select_row(*) neither narrows the data nor facilitates the needed min/max year extraction. A more appropriate approach would be to use f_select_column(year) and optionally f_sort_column(year) to find the range.
